reason: The NDT unified view exposes node._Instruments as a scalar protocol identifier. The frozen parent runner used an array UNNEST expression and must be corrected before any future M-Lab values are queried.
required_partition_filter: date must cover the frozen GP0 topology interval

official_evidence.claim: node._Instruments identifies one of web100, tcpinfo, or ndt7; a.MeanThroughputMbps and a.MinRTT are the unified download metrics.
The official example compares node._Instruments directly with scalar string values.

overwrite_policy: The parent-generated query may be replaced exactly once before any M-Lab result lock; future result or import artifacts may never be overwritten.
